alchemist_box [elemental essence / bone: A flat wooden case that stands open like a book, its inside racked with rows of small glass vials and stoppered jars, some still holding a murky green liquid.
barracks_door_02: An arch of rough, radiating brickwork framing a heavy door of near-black planks strapped with a plain iron band. The timber is coarse and waterstained.
bones_01 [fire essence]: A heap of old bones, dry and picked clean.
bones_02 [sacred symbol]: Human bones strewn loose across the ground — ribs and long bones, dry and picked clean.
bossfightdoor: A lofty portal of pale golden stone: a rounded arch of stepped concentric mouldings framing a deep-set doorway, with slender engaged columns at the jambs. The dressed blocks are smooth and precisely fitted.
button_blue_torture_2: A fist-sized rectangular block of stone set proud of the brickwork, shaped for pressing with the flat of a hand, its edges dark with grime.
button_green_torture_2: A small oblong stone block protruding from the mortared brick wall at chest height, plain and worn smooth across its face.
button_red_torture_2: A fist-sized rectangular block of stone jutting from the mortared brick wall, sized for a palm to press, its face worn smooth with use.
button_yellow_torture_2: A palm-sized rectangular block of stone standing out from the rough brick wall, its pressing face rubbed smooth and dark.
catacombs_doors_demon_01: A pair of tall, narrow door leaves of rough, near-black timber, round-shouldered at the top, their battered planks chipped and split along the edges with crude iron fittings at the meeting edge.
catacombs_doors_demon_02: Twin narrow doors of coarse blackened wood with rounded tops, hung in a brick archway; the planks are gouged and worn, held by rough iron latch-plates.
corpse_bloodtypecommon: A dead body in ragged clothes left where it fell, sprawled face-down, dark dried blood pooled beneath it.
device: A squat iron panel set into the stone wall at waist height, its dark hatch tilted open on stiff hinges, the metal dulled and bitten with rust.
door_secret: To the eye it is nothing but wall: a door-sized slab of dressed sandstone cut to sit flush with the surrounding blocks, its joints lost among the ordinary mortar lines.
door_to_torture_wing: A broad archway built of rough, radiating stone blocks, closed by heavy doors of dull dark timber. The wood is thick, plain, and stained almost black with age and grime.
door_torture2_password: A heavy round-shouldered door of age-blackened planks, set deep between massive piers of mortared brick. Its timber is dull and scarred, with no ornament at all.
door_torture_secret: A stretch of rough, dark mortared brick the size of a doorway, laid flush with the wall around it so that nothing but plain, grimy masonry shows.
entrance: A tall rounded archway of golden sandstone built in stepped concentric rings, holding high doors of dark polished wood. The stonework is smoothly dressed, the timber deep brown and heavy.
goodlootbox: A small stout box of russet-brown boards with a plain flat lid.
hosilla_room_door: A tall door of dark-stained wood, its face divided into long recessed panels, hung in a moulded arch of pale golden sandstone.
locked_armory: A narrow doorway arched with rough bricks and closed by a thick, rounded-top door of blackened planks, its surface scarred and utterly plain.
loot_armorstand: A full suit of plate armor assembled upright on a display stand, dull steel from closed helm to boots, arms hanging at its sides.
loot_armorstand half-plate: A suit of half-plate mounted upright on a stand — breastplate, pauldrons and helm of dull grey steel over a dark frame.
loot_boxsimple: A plain packing crate of rough pale planks nailed into slats, gaps showing between the boards.
loot_boxsimple (h): A plain packing crate of rough pale planks nailed into slats, gaps showing between the boards.
loot_corpse: A dead body sprawled on its back where it fell, arms flung wide, still dressed in its worn clothes.
loot_torture: A long, low chest of rough dark planks, its flat lid crudely patched with mismatched battens nailed on at odd angles.
loot_torture (l): A long, low chest of rough dark planks, its flat lid crudely patched with mismatched battens nailed on at odd angles.
lootchest: A heavy wooden traveling chest with a rounded barrel lid, its dark boards bound by broad riveted straps.
lootchest (l): A heavy wooden traveling chest with a rounded barrel lid, its dark boards bound by broad riveted straps.
lootchest h: A heavy wooden traveling chest with a rounded barrel lid, its dark boards bound by broad riveted straps.
lootchest2 (cooking): A heavy wooden traveling chest with a rounded barrel lid, its dark boards bound by broad riveted straps.
lootchest3 (cooking): A heavy wooden traveling chest with a rounded barrel lid, its dark boards bound by broad riveted straps.
lootchest_lockpicks: A heavy wooden traveling chest with a rounded barrel lid, its dark boards bound by broad riveted straps.
lootcupboard: A tall cupboard of dark-stained wood, open shelves crammed with books and oddments beside a carved door panel hung with an iron ring-pull, its corner posts topped with turned finials.
lootcupboard (h): A tall cupboard of dark-stained wood, open shelves crammed with books and oddments beside a carved door panel hung with an iron ring-pull, its corner posts topped with turned finials.
lootweaponstand: A long open rack of dark iron whose slotted rails hold a row of axes and pole-arms upright, blades to the ceiling.
luxery_caseket: A small round-bodied casket with a domed lid carved in a swirl, small enough to tuck under one arm.
market_place_jug_03: A round-bellied earthenware jug of dull, unglazed terracotta with a short narrow neck.
rest_camp_indor_inactive: A cold fire-pit: a flat stone slab strewn with ash and charred remains, a few embers still winking faint red.
secretdooropener: A burnished metal wall sconce: a slender cylindrical torch-cup on an angled swing-arm bracket bolted to the stone, its brass surface smudged with soot.
temple_door_small_interactive: A modest round-topped door of deep red-brown planks, hung in a smoothly moulded arch of pale sandstone with a worn stone slab for a threshold. The wood is plain and heavy, darkened by years of smoke and handling.
torturedooropener: A stubby rectangular block of dark stone jutting from the mortared brick wall at chest height, its edges dulled with grime.
torturewingopener: A small oblong push-block of stone standing proud of the brickwork, sized for a palm, its face worn smooth against the rough wall around it.
tutorial_loot: A small traveling chest of wine-dark reddish wood, its rounded barrel lid bound in bright riveted metal straps.
